fields.name: filing_type
fields.description: The type of court document. One of: Complaint | Answer | Motion | Brief | Opposition | Reply | Order | Judgment | Stipulation | Subpoena | Notice | Declaration | Deposition | Petition | Other

fields.name: court_level
fields.description: The level of the court. One of: Federal | State | Appellate | Administrative | Tribal | Other

fields.name: court_name
fields.description: Full official name of the court (e.g., "United States District Court for the Southern District of New York", "Superior Court of the State of California, County of Los Angeles")

fields.name: district_or_division
fields.description: The specific district, division, or department of the court (e.g., "Southern District of New York", "Civil Division, Dept. 45")

fields.name: judge_name
fields.description: Name of the presiding judge or magistrate (null if not yet assigned or not stated)

fields.name: case_number
fields.description: The official docket or case number assigned by the court (e.g., "1:25-cv-04812-LTS", "Case No. BC712345")

fields.name: case_name
fields.description: The case caption name (e.g., "Apex Corp. v. Meridian Technologies, Inc.")

fields.name: filing_date
fields.description: Date the document was filed with the court, format YYYY-MM-DD

fields.name: hearing_date
fields.description: Date of any associated hearing, trial, or oral argument, format YYYY-MM-DD (null if not scheduled or not stated)

fields.name: plaintiff_name
fields.description: Full name of the plaintiff(s); if multiple, concatenate with "; " separator

fields.name: defendant_name
fields.description: Full name of the defendant(s); if multiple, concatenate with "; " separator

fields.name: filing_party
fields.description: Which party filed this document. One of: Plaintiff | Defendant | Third_Party | Court | Other

fields.name: attorney_name
fields.description: Full name of the attorney signing or filing the document

fields.name: bar_number
fields.description: State bar number of the filing attorney

fields.name: law_firm
fields.description: Name of the law firm representing the filing party (null if in-house or pro se)

fields.name: attorney_email
fields.description: Email address of the filing attorney (null if not provided)

fields.name: relief_requested
fields.description: Summary of the relief sought in this filing (up to 300 chars)

fields.name: causes_of_action
fields.description: Array of strings naming each cause of action or claim (e.g., ["Breach of Contract", "Fraudulent Misrepresentation", "Unjust Enrichment"])

fields.name: jurisdictional_basis
fields.description: The basis for the court's jurisdiction. One of: Federal_Question | Diversity | Supplemental | State | Bankruptcy | Admiralty | Other

fields.name: jury_demand
fields.description: Boolean — true if the filing includes a demand for trial by jury

fields.name: pages
fields.description: Total number of pages in the filed document as integer (null if not stated)

sections.title: Dates And Terms
sections.description: Dates And Terms fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Document Details
sections.description: Document Details fields extracted from the document.

sections.title: Parties
sections.description: Parties fields extracted from the document.

completeness_checklist.description: All required fields are present or explicitly null with low confidence when absent.
Each declared section was reviewed for extractable evidence.
Object array fields use their item_schema for consistent nested extraction.
